mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, login_id, password, gender, birth_date, age_group, email, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_name, login_id, password, gender, birth_date, age_group, email) VALUES (#{userName}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{ageGroup}, #{email})
